summary: Synthetic PR review result with generic evidence labels and caller-owned merge policy.

findings.title: Validation evidence is missing
findings.summary: The synthetic change record describes a review-sensitive behavior change but does not include a caller-owned validation result.
findings.recommendation: Ask the embedding workflow to attach a sanitized validation summary before downstream triage.

findings.title: Merge authority remains caller-owned
findings.summary: The handoff can name a review concern but must not decide merge, assignment, priority, or repository policy.
findings.recommendation: Keep merge policy, owner assignment, and tracker writes in the embedding workflow.

findings.title: Low-severity wording cleanup
findings.summary: The synthetic packet has a minor wording issue that is not candidate-worthy by default.
findings.recommendation: Leave low-severity editorial routing to the caller when needed.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: No real issue keys, repository names, branches, accounts, file paths, hostnames, or private policy

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic PR review result with generic evidence labels only.

## Findings
- High: Validation evidence is missing.
- Medium: Merge authority remains caller-owned.
- Low: Low-severity wording cleanup.

## Boundary
No target selection, private naming, merge policy, owner assignment, tracker writes, or repository interpretation is part of this fixture.
